description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine ASCC_2, and is implemented by a call to ASCC_2. This API is used to apply a series of faults at various locations in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = ascc_1a(sid, all, status, relfile, fcdfile)
python_syntax: ierr = ascc_1a(sid, all, status, relfile, fcdfile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of ten elements specifying integer options. (input).

parameters.name: relfile
parameters.description: Relay data (.rel) file. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: fcdfile
parameters.description: Fault control (.fcd) file. (input; blank by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

status.description: Three phase and line-to-ground fault (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘flt3phlg’.
line-out faults (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘linout’.
line-end faults (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘linend’.
flat conditions option (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘flatop’.
pre-fault conditions taken from working case.
impose flat conditions as pre-fault condition.
fault analysis generator reactance option; ignored if generators are already “converted” (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘genxop’.
option (1 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rptop’.
full output at home bus and N levels away.
full output at home bus, summary N levels away.
number of levels back for contributions if STATUS(6) = 1 or 2. STATUS(7) > 0 (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rptlvl’.
branch quantity code for line to ground faults (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘brnop’.
dc line and FACTS device option (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘dcload’.
transformer impedance correction option (1 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘zcorec’.
do not apply to zero sequence.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
line end fault is invalid; bus table is full.
fault analysis is invalid due to the presence of in-service induction machines that are in the “stalled” or “tripped” state.
bus type code and series element status inconsistencies.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
